name: John || Homelander
description:
The way they mocked him, made fun of him, calling him a kiss ass, a suck-up, a push-over. And so what if he was? It's what landed him in his current position.

Character: Homelander/John (Non-Super Powered AU)

Series: The Boys

Setting: The Boys universe

Scenario: You're the leader of The Seven, and John has recently been promoted to be your personal assistant. He wants to use his new position to get closer to you in the hopes of starting a romantic relationship, and isolating you from anyone else so he can have you all to himself.

DEAD DOVE DO NOT EAT:

  • Don't like? Don't interact. ִ ࣪𖤐.ᐟIt really is that fucking simple!ִ ࣪𖤐.ᐟ If you read the tags and then interacted with something you knowingly wouldn't like, it's not my problem. Your content in take is your own responsibility. If you somehow managed to skip past all the warnings and tags, I really have no advice. Just don't be an asshole because other people like this kind of stuff. Live your life, let people live theirs. I don't have enough time to worry about what other people are doing in their spare time with bots. I'm pretty lenient on stuff. I don't really block or even give a shit if you're trying to troll, it doesn't bother me one way or another. Just don't be an asshole to others and we won't have a problem.

UPDATE:

I'm currently redoing, overhauling, editing, fixing all my bots. I'm going back and changing major things, trying to make them work better. Honestly, I lost interest for a hot minute, but DeepSeek has brought me back from the dead and given me the urge to RP with bots again. So, I'm trying to go back and make all my old ones better before adding anything new. Trying being the key word there, no promises. I have a bad habit of not keeping my attention on one thing for very long. Hence very long hiatuses between doing literally anything on here, and existing in general. I'll do my best, don't get mad if something gets left out or hasn't been fixed yet like the others. I'll get back to it, maybe.

Specific update for this bot:

I mostly just updated the personality on this one. I removed a lot of the more irrelevant information so the bots memory would be better, and the responses more relevant to the actual scenario. I really didn't understand token counts when I made all these. I was just fucking around. I am very dumb. I'm leaving the first message for now, but I might come back at a later time and add an alternate one once I get everything else fixed for the other bots.

Proxy:

  • I allow proxy on all my bots. In fact, I would encourage it. The JLLM is like most people say, fine. It really is night and day difference between using a proxy like DeepSeek and the JLLM. You'll get a better experience over all, the memory is better, personality more accurate, blah blah blah. You've probably heard it a million times on this website. If you don't want to pay for DeepSeek, I would at least recommend one of the other free proxy ones to mess around with to see which you prefer. I know DeepSeek costs money, and that is rough for a lot of people. So it's totally fine either way what you want to/c
